name: 金句型（女主宣言）
description: 女主以卑微身份對皇帝直言進諫，明知可能被殺仍堅持發聲。這種對白把角色的勇氣和智慧推到極致，觀眾會為她的膽量喝彩。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Your Majesty, even if you decide to execute me, I must speak my mind. The premature deaths of the princes are not acts of heaven, but the work of people. The Empress is conspiring with insurgents and is determined to eliminate the crown prince.
